data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for loyalty access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that loyalty customers receive earlier access (30 days vs 7 days), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this feature. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking system, such as slot visibility and booking confirmations, without addressing the loyalty access requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of relevant evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of loyalty access for customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for loyalty access feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the loyalty access functionality.
